mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM course_category
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM course_category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_category WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_category (parent_id, name, code, sort, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
